utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: That was supposed to be a good thing , I forget why .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Just listen , Monica , I , do you know , okay , do you know , I could not sleep for like a month because I got like a dot of ink on one of the sofa cushions .

emotion_cause.span: 2_I could not sleep for like a month because I got like a dot of ink on one of the sofa cushions .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well , you ... you coulda just turned the cushion over .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah , I would have except I had a big spaghetti stain on the other side .

emotion_cause.span: 4_I had a big spaghetti stain on the other side .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , this is what I am talking about , this . I ... I need to live in a land where people can spill .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You can spill . In the sink .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Aw , honey it is not your fault , you know this is who you are , and I love you , and I want us to be friends , and if I keep living here I do not see that happening .

emotion_cause.span: 8_I want us to be friends , and if I keep living here I do not see that happening .
8_I want us to be friends , and if I keep living here I do not see that happening .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No you are not , you are wondering which cushion it is .
